languages.text: "Теперь, когда Экзальт-177 ранен, мы рискуем остаться еще и безоружными. Он единственный, кто был способен укротить машинный дух этих турелей..." {n}Себериан проводит аугментированными пальцами по лицу, будто смахивает паутину.{/n} "Довольно. Говорите и покончим с этим".
languages.translation_comment:
Если Экзальт ранен
Один раз в луп

traits.locale_text: "Теперь, когда Экзальт-177 ранен, мы рискуем остаться еще и безоружными. Он единственный, кто был способен укротить машинный дух этих турелей..." {n}Себериан проводит аугментированными пальцами по лицу, будто смахивает паутину.{/n} "Довольно. Говорите и покончим с этим".

languages.translation_comment:
Если Экзальт ранен
Один раз в луп

languages.text: "And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."
languages.original_text: "Теперь, когда Экзальт-177 ранен, мы рискуем остаться еще и безоружными. Он единственный, кто был способен укротить машинный дух этих турелей..." {n}Себериан проводит аугментированными пальцами по лицу, будто смахивает паутину.{/n} "Довольно. Говорите и покончим с этим".

traits.locale_text: "And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."

"And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."

"And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."

languages.text: "Und angesichts der Verwundung von Exalt-117 laufen wir überdies Gefahr, unbewaffnet zu sein. Er ist der Einzige, der die Maschinengeister dieser Geschütze bändigen kann ..." {n}Seberian fährt sich mit seinen augmentierten Fingern über das Gesicht, als wolle er ein Spinnennetz entfernen.{/n} "Genug. Sprecht und bringt es hinter Euch."
languages.original_text: "And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."

traits.locale_text: "Und angesichts der Verwundung von Exalt-117 laufen wir überdies Gefahr, unbewaffnet zu sein. Er ist der Einzige, der die Maschinengeister dieser Geschütze bändigen kann ..." {n}Seberian fährt sich mit seinen augmentierten Fingern über das Gesicht, als wolle er ein Spinnennetz entfernen.{/n} "Genug. Sprecht und bringt es hinter Euch."

languages.text: “如今尊使-117受了伤，我们可能连武器都保不住了。唯有他能驯服那些炮台的机魂……”{n}塞贝里安用他的植入物手指抹了一下脸，像是在拂去蛛网。{/n}“够了。有什么话就赶紧说。”
languages.original_text: "And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."

traits.locale_text: “如今尊使-117受了伤，我们可能连武器都保不住了。唯有他能驯服那些炮台的机魂……”{n}塞贝里安用他的植入物手指抹了一下脸，像是在拂去蛛网。{/n}“够了。有什么话就赶紧说。”

languages.text: « Et maintenant qu'Exalt-117 est blessé, nous pourrions bien nous retrouver également désarmés. Il est le seul à pouvoir dompter les esprits de la machine qui habitent les tourelles... » {n}Seberian passe sa main augmentée sur son visage comme s'il cherchait à se débarrasser d'une toile d'araignée.{/n} « Assez. Parlez, et finissons-en. »
languages.original_text: "And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."

traits.locale_text: « Et maintenant qu'Exalt-117 est blessé, nous pourrions bien nous retrouver également désarmés. Il est le seul à pouvoir dompter les esprits de la machine qui habitent les tourelles... » {n}Seberian passe sa main augmentée sur son visage comme s'il cherchait à se débarrasser d'une toile d'araignée.{/n} « Assez. Parlez, et finissons-en. »

languages.text: «Y ahora que Exaltado-117 ha resultado herido, también corremos el riesgo de perder los dientes. Es el único capaz de aplacar a los espíritus máquina de esas torretas...». {n}Seberian se pasa los dedos aumentados por el rostro como si se estuviese apartando una telaraña.{/n} «Basta. Diga lo que viene a decir y acabemos de una vez».
languages.original_text: "And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."

traits.locale_text: «Y ahora que Exaltado-117 ha resultado herido, también corremos el riesgo de perder los dientes. Es el único capaz de aplacar a los espíritus máquina de esas torretas...». {n}Seberian se pasa los dedos aumentados por el rostro como si se estuviese apartando una telaraña.{/n} «Basta. Diga lo que viene a decir y acabemos de una vez».

languages.text: "Şimdi Yüce-117'nin yaralanmasıyla silahsız kalma riskimiz var. O taretlerin makine ruhunu eğitebilecek tek kişi o..." {n}Seberian, ogmente edilmiş parmaklarını sanki bir örümcek ağını silkelermiş gibi yüzünde gezdiriyor.{/n} "Yeter. Konuş da bitsin bu iş."
languages.original_text: "And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi Yüce-117'nin yaralanmasıyla silahsız kalma riskimiz var. O taretlerin makine ruhunu eğitebilecek tek kişi o..." {n}Seberian, ogmente edilmiş parmaklarını sanki bir örümcek ağını silkelermiş gibi yüzünde gezdiriyor.{/n} "Yeter. Konuş da bitsin bu iş."

languages.text: 「そして今、エクサルト117が負傷している。我々も無防備になる危険がある。あの砲塔の機械霊を制御できるのは彼だけだ…」{n}シベリアは強化された指で顔を撫でるように、蜘蛛の巣を払う。{/n}「もういい。話して済ませる。」
languages.original_text: "And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."

traits.locale_text: 「そして今、エクサルト117が負傷している。我々も無防備になる危険がある。あの砲塔の機械霊を制御できるのは彼だけだ…」{n}シベリアは強化された指で顔を撫でるように、蜘蛛の巣を払う。{/n}「もういい。話して済ませる。」
